document.title: M1 Lattice — Status and Progress Tracking
document.purpose: Provide a clear, continuously updated map of the current state of the M1 system, including component status, infrastructure readiness, interface development, and next required actions. This document is the execution-facing mirror of progress.

threads.M1-CMD: Execution, tracking, and progress management (this document)

context.principle: Separate design from execution. This document reflects what is, what is incomplete, and what comes next.

001__philosophy.json.notes: Philosophy updated to reflect transport model, link centrality, and ambiguity→precision gradient.

002__spec.json.notes: v1 core spec complete; v2 model simplifies structure (entities reduced, aspects unified).

003__semantic-examination.json.notes: Still relevant; may require reinterpretation under v2 model.

006__python-api.txt.notes: Early sketch of Python API; needs alignment with v2 aspect-centric model.

007__transport-spec.json.notes: v1 core spec complete; v2 model simplifies structure; merging explicitly externalized.

020__spec.json.notes: Entities reduced to identity anchors; structure (including links) lives exclusively in aspects.

021__transport.json.notes: v2 transport model defined conceptually as non-authoritative contributions.

023__merging.json.notes: Defines conflict spectrum and roles (Producer, Resolver, Consumer).

core_identity.notes: Single id model; aliasing expressed via relationships.

entities.notes: Entities reduced to identity anchors; structure lives in aspects.

aspects.notes: All meaning and structure expressed via aspects.

links.notes: No longer primitive; represented as typed aspects (e.g., alias-for).

tables.notes: Resolution layer remains external and non-authoritative.

aliasing.notes: Alias relationships expressed via canonical aspect (alias-for); resolution behavior remains open.

transport_object_storage.notes: File format simplified to id → aspects; non-authoritative fragments of global dataset.

merging_model.notes: Conflict resolution and merging explicitly delegated to applications.

guid_and_tag_uri.notes: Unified id model adopted; legacy distinction reduced.

table_resolution.notes: Remains application-defined; no change in v2.

object_browser.notes: Still open; may be significantly simpler under v2.

resolver_tools.notes: Alias resolution and conflict handling tools now required.

active_focus.primary: Bring M1 v2.0 into executable form
supporting: Implement minimal loader for id → aspects structure
Align Python API with aspect-centric model
Introduce alias emission (Zoo) and test identity unification

next_steps.action: Create first concrete .m1 files using v2 transport model
next_steps.result: Validate real-world usability of simplified transport
Executable system for reading and inspecting M1 data

next_steps.action: Implement basic API (entity lookup, aspect queries, traversal)
Emit alias-for relationships from Zoo and observe behavior

next_steps.result: Early insight into merging and ambiguity handling

next-action: Create first real .m1 transport file using v2 structure
rules: This document reflects reality, not intention.
Statuses must be updated as work progresses.
Do not expand scope during execution cycles.
